productDisplayName: Rockport Men Jelba Brown Flip Flops
description: Designed for the man who never compromises on style and comfort, this Jelba casual flip flop from rockport makes for a great addition to your wardrobe. Wear it all by itself on a warm day, or pair it with warm toe socks on a chilly day and revel in the comfort of luxurious leather.UpperSoft and smooth leather midfoot straps with twill fabric detailing on the midfoot rim and a toe separator to lock the foot in placePadded fabric inner lining for the straps for abrasion-free comfortPull loop on the strap for easy on/offPadded suede footbed with stitch detailing for exemplary comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with strategically placed terraced lugs and grooved lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for easy movementSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to clean the footbedDo not store in direct sunlight
